assertions.rationale: The specific IClock to TimeProvider migration is Duende v8-specific knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Uses GetUtcNow() method instead of UtcNow property
TimeProvider is injected via constructor (standard DI)
assertions.rationale: Without knowing IClock was replaced with TimeProvider, an LLM cannot show the correct DI pattern.

assertions.assertion: Does NOT reference Duende.IdentityServer.IClock or ICancellationTokenProvider
assertions.rationale: Without v8 migration knowledge, an LLM might suggest keeping or wrapping IClock.
